title: Monastery Scriptorium
summary: A hand-illuminated manuscript at candlelight — five illuminated capitals on the rail; gilt fills the active letter and a sparse quill flourish curls around it.
darkAccent: gilt #B3893D — only on the active-dock initial fill and the Saved-state pill background
typeface: Cormorant Garamond (rail capitals and pane titles only) + Atkinson Hyperlegible (body, forms, log lines, labels — engineered for legibility on dark backgrounds)
railTreatment: five illuminated capitals S, M, B, D, L set in Cormorant Garamond 28 px ink-secondary; active capital fills gilt #B3893D and a sparse hand-drawn quill flourish curls around it in inline SVG at ink-secondary tone
